revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from related word |name=From a related word or phrase |from=a word or [[phrase]] ([[Terminology|term]]) |to=a page title that is related in some way. This redirect might be a good search term, or it could be a candidate for a [[wikt:|Wiktionary]] link |info=** Redirects from related words are not properly [[:Template:R from alternative spelling|redirects from alternative spelling]]s of the same word. They are also different from redirects that are [[:Template:R from subtopic|subtopic]]s or [[:Template:R to related topic|related topics]], because unlike those, a related word or phrase probably does not warrant its own subtopic section in the target page or possess the possibility of ever becoming an article, template, project page, and so forth. |all category=Redirects from related words }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from related word |name=From a related word or phrase |from=a word or [[phrase]] ([[Terminology|term]]) |to=a page title that is related in some way. This redirect might be a good search term, or it could be a candidate for a [[wikt:|Wiktionary]] link |info=** Redirects from related words are not properly [[:Template:R from alternative spelling|redirects from alternative spelling]]s of the same word. They are also different from redirects that are [[:Template:R from subtopic|subtopic]]s or [[:Template:R to related topic|related topics]], because unlike those, a related word or phrase probably does not warrant its own subtopic section in the target page or possess the possibility of ever becoming an article, template, project page, and so forth. |all category=Redirects from related words }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

This redirect might be a good search term, or it could be a candidate for a [[wikt:|Wiktionary]] link |info=** Redirects from related words are not properly [[:Template:R from alternative spelling|redirects from alternative spelling]]s of the same word. They are also different from redirects that are [[:Template:R from subtopic|subtopic]]s or [[:Template:R to related topic|related topics]], because unlike those, a related word or phrase probably does not warrant its own subtopic section in the target page or possess the possibility of ever becoming an article, template, project page, and so forth. |all category=Redirects from related words }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

They are also different from redirects that are [[:Template:R from subtopic|subtopic]]s or [[:Template:R to related topic|related topics]], because unlike those, a related word or phrase probably does not warrant its own subtopic section in the target page or possess the possibility of ever becoming an article, template, project page, and so forth. |all category=Redirects from related words }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

They are also different from redirects that are [[:Template:R from subtopic|subtopic]]s or [[:Template:R to related topic|related topics]], because unlike those, a related word or phrase probably does not warrant its own subtopic section in the target page or possess the possibility of ever becoming an article, template, project page, and so forth. |all category=Redirects from related words }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from related word |name=From a related word or phrase |from=a word or [[:en:Phrase|Phrase]] ([[:en:terminology|term]]) |to=a page title that is related in some way. This redirect might be a good search term, or it could be a candidate for a [[wikt:|Wiktionary]] link |info=** Redirects from related words are not properly [[:Template:R from alternative spelling|redirects from alternative spelling]]s of the same word. They are also different from redirects that are [[:Template:R from subtopic|subtopic]]s or [[:Template:R to related topic|related topics]], because unlike those, a related word or phrase probably does not warrant its own subtopic section in the target page or possess the possibility of ever becoming an article, template, project page, and so forth. |all category=Redirects from related words }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
